name: Ginger Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Serrano chili, stemmed and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Use immediately or within 6 hours of preparation, as the flavors will intensify over time.
3. This thick, dark, rich, and spicy sauce pairs well with bland foods like tofu when used as a dipping sauce.
